kept.text:
Day 82 of learning how to script on Roblox! 👀✨

Kept it super simple tonight since I'm currently dealing with food poisoning (DON'T EAT FOOD FROM TIKTOK) 🥲 So here's a script I came up with that I made completely on my own without needing to look back on anything! 

Of course I would not use this method for an official game and I would use server storage/destroy to reduce any possible lag. However, to keep is simple enough for me to actually challenge my full memory I used if/elseif statements for this one and lots of transparency prompts! 

I'm really hoping tomorrow I don't feel that bad so I can continue learning some new things I haven't gotten to yet with BrawlDevs advanced scripting series such as drag detection and raycasting 🥹

Substack（サブスタ）を始めて2週間。

ここ5日ほど記事の更新は出来ていなかったのですが、
軽く呟いていただけで…

・登録者：458名
・総フォロワー：557名

になっていました。
投稿するたびに、じわじわ伸び続けています。

気軽に呟けるので正直、Xより居心地いいかもしれません…w
殺伐としたSNSに疲れている人、かなりおすすめです。
